query:
INSERT INTO questions (question, choiceA, choiceB, choiceC, choiceD, correctAnswer, level, category, timePerQuestion) VALUES
('What is the correct spelling of the word meaning "to move quickly"?', 'runn', 'run', 'rune', 'rund', 'B', 'A1', 'Spelling', 15),
('Which sentence is grammatically correct?', 'She go to school every day', 'She goes to school every day', 'She going to school every day', 'She gone to school every day', 'B', 'A1', 'Grammar', 15),
('What does "hello" mean?', 'goodbye', 'a greeting', 'thank you', 'please', 'B', 'A1', 'Vocabulary', 15),
('Choose the correct form of the verb: "I ___ to the store yesterday"', 'go', 'goes', 'went', 'going', 'C', 'A2', 'Grammar', 12),
('What is the opposite of "hot"?', 'warm', 'cold', 'cool', 'freezing', 'B', 'A2', 'Vocabulary', 12),
('Which word is spelled correctly?', 'recieve', 'receive', 'recive', 'receeve', 'B', 'B1', 'Spelling', 10),
('If I had known about the party, I ___ attended.', 'would have', 'will have', 'would', 'have', 'A', 'B1', 'Grammar', 10),
('What does "persevere" mean?', 'to give up easily', 'to continue despite difficulty', 'to move quickly', 'to speak loudly', 'B', 'B2', 'Vocabulary', 8),
('Choose the sentence with correct punctuation:', 'She said, I love reading books.', 'She said "I love reading books."', 'She said I love reading books', 'She said, "I love reading books."', 'D', 'B2', 'Grammar', 8),
('Which word is a synonym for "meticulous"?', 'careless', 'thorough', 'hasty', 'lazy', 'B', 'C1', 'Vocabulary', 6);
